---
title: "Key Info and Announcements"
date-modified: "today"
format: 
  html:
    link-external-newwindow: true
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

## Announcements

- Office Hours
  - Today, Monday, 3-4pm, virtual
    - With Miyuki, [Link to OH](https://ohsu.webex.com/ohsu/j.php?MTID=m9dee83f01330f54f7787ba9fd95737fb)
  - Wednesday, 3-4pm, in-person, RLSB 3A003B
    - With me
  - Friday, 11am-12pm, virtual
    - With Katie
- Do you get the OHSU Now student emails?
  - I just saw they are having a Spring Social and have a lot of Mental Health Resources (including CBT for Anxiety)
- Public Health Week THIS WEEK!
  - Schedule: <https://ohsu-psu-sph.org/this-is-public-health/>
- Annual Public Health Week Conference on 4/11


## Key Dates

- Lab 1 dues 4/11

## Last class
